❯ Create a file hello.py that prints Hello from murder harness test

● Write(hello.py)
  ⎿  Wrote 1 lines to hello.py
      1 print("Hello from murder harness test")

● Created hello.py with the print statement. You can run it with python hello.py.

✻ Sautéed for 3s

❯ Now change it to print Hello twice and show me the file contents

● Update(hello.py)
  ⎿  Added 1 line
      1  print("Hello from murder harness test")
      2 +print("Hello from murder harness test")

  Read 1 file (ctrl+o to expand)

● Done! Here's the updated file:

  print("Hello from murder harness test")
  print("Hello from murder harness test")

  The file now prints the message twice.

✻ Churned for 3s
